title: Develop and manage a chemical use strategy
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and manage a chemical use strategy demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and evaluate need for chemical use

pcs.text: Evaluate pest control strategies and their relevance to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate pest control strategies and their relevance to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate pest control strategies and their relevance to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Identify, assess and incorporate external factors that influence the chemical use strategy according to workplace conditions, legislation and codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, assess and incorporate external factors that influence the chemical use strategy according to workplace conditions, legislation and codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, assess and incorporate external factors that influence the chemical use strategy according to workplace conditions, legislation and codes of practice.

pcs.text: Document requirements for chemical use strategy according to workplace requirements, legislation and codes of practice

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document requirements for chemical use strategy according to workplace requirements, legislation and codes of practice.

pcs.text: Identify and review available chemicals and their methods of application and assess the relevance to the workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and review available chemicals and their methods of application and assess the relevance to the workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and review available chemicals and their methods of application and assess the relevance to the workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify and evaluate need for chemical use

elements.title: Develop a chemical use risk management strategy

pcs.text: Identify and assess health and safety in the workplace hazards in the handling, transportation and storage of chemicals

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards, risks and develop control measures according to regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Develop a risk management strategy for chemical use according to legislation and workplace principles

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a risk management strategy for chemical use according to legislation and workplace principles.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and document insurance cover for intended chemical use according to workplace guidelines.
